title: What was SEELEs intention with the MP Evas
display_title: What was SEELEs intention with the MP Evas
wikitext:
[]: What was SEELE's intention with the MP Evas?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Aug 25, 2009 11:42 pm It seems highly unlikely that they knew how 3I would turn out in the End, so what were they originally planning?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Tue Aug 25, 2009 11:50 pm They were mindfucking Shinji so he would be in a horrible enough of a mental state to initiate it for them. read the latest chapters of the manga and watch through EoE again and you'll see that that's most likely was the game plan.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Aug 26, 2009 12:02 am They meant to do precisely what happened, they just didn't expect Shinji to reject Instrumentality in the end. They assumed that his mind would be in such a bad state that he'd surely accept Instrumentality and everything would go according to their scenario.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Wed Aug 26, 2009 12:03 am But why Shinji? Why not Rei?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Wed Aug 26, 2009 12:08 am Rei was Gendo's puppet up until she heard Shinji scream and was working to achieve his scenario and not SEELE's. Plus Rei was Lillith so I'm not usre that would've worked exactly. But I also think it was becuase Unit 01 was Lillith's only true offspring like they said, and they couldn't use the Lance of Longinus after the Areal fight. So they had to got through Shinji. That's my theory anyways.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Aug 26, 2009 12:12 am CyberXIII wrote: But why Shinji? Why not Rei?

[]:             Quote Post by Cypher » Wed Aug 26, 2009 12:15 am If they needed Shinji to initiate third impact what would have happened if Misato hadn't shown up when she did in EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Wed Aug 26, 2009 12:18 am WOW! good question.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Aug 26, 2009 12:32 am More likely scenario: Seele Checklist of Fun 1. Kill Gendo (failed, he escaped to TD) 2. Kill Shinji (failed, Misato rescued him) 3. Use the MP Evas to eliminate any other threats. (succeeded) 4. Use EVA-01 to summon the LnY from the moon to restrain EVA-01 (succeeded) 5. Use EVA-01 to turn everyone into tang (failed in execution but ultimately successful) 6. Lounge about for eternity. (succeeded? failed? hard to tell)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Aug 26, 2009 12:39 am Cypher wrote: If they needed Shinji to initiate third impact what would have happened if Misato hadn't shown up when she did in EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Wed Aug 26, 2009 9:23 am oh, thanks for this thread. this is the main point that makes me feel stupid about EVA so maybe this discussion can finally give me some insight. the way i always saw it is that they didn't really need Shinji... i mean, it's not like he was really doing anything inside unit 01 except for screaming his head off, at least up until the point lilith-rei showed up and shoved the fate of the world into his hands. i always thought they just needed unit 01, and since it had already "awakened" on its own (it did move to save Shinji, so maybe they were expecting it to just start moving anyway when the MP evas started their mayhem?), that was kinda all they needed. they just weren't expecting lilith-rei to crash their party. however... the MP evas were the "adam" part of the equation while eva 01 was the "lilith" part? no souls involved/needed? yet 3I could still happen? i am le confused. (...but what else is new?) what really bugs me, though, is what SEELE's intentions were BEFORE gendo's scenario came into play. in episode 21, after yui dies, gendo states that he's going to present the human instrumentality project to SEELE. i had somehow always believed this had all been SEELE's idea to begin with, and gendo just decided he could give it his own twist-- but apparently not. so what was SEELE's intention in creating the evas to begin with? somehow thinking that they were only building these things to defend humanity from the upcoming angels just doesn't sit well with me.

[]:             Quote Post by xeon » Thu Aug 27, 2009 5:09 pm I thought they needed the eva series to form anti-AT field.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 28, 2009 7:18 am They needed the MP Evas to become surrogate Jesuses and open up the Path to God. Or, the lame but oh-so-true answer: They do whatever is required (the more mysterious or grotesque, the better) to move the plot forward. One of those "don't have to be fully reasoned out so long as they work in-script" things. But we can pretend, I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by LordCaldwell » Tue Oct 13, 2009 11:39 am The MP evas were needed to become the sephiroth in the tree of life. There are ten Of them. MP evas 1-9 were the lesser sephiroth, and Shinji in unit one was placed at the head. (kether) the tree of life is basically an illustration of reality, the univereses creation, and the order of life. So by recreating it, and making Shinji become kether, he basically becmes god, and is given the task of initiating third impact by opening the hall of gaff. However, he rejects insturmentality because after a long psycobattle wtb himself, he realizes that wihout pain, here cannot be joy. And so, combining all of humanities consiousnesses would be pointless.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Tue Oct 13, 2009 11:52 am Legendary wrote: More likely scenario: Seele Checklist of Fun 6. Lounge about for eternity. (succeeded? failed? hard to tell)

[]:             Quote Post by Fredrick2003 » Fri Oct 16, 2009 3:20 am LordCaldwell wrote: The MP evas were needed to become the sephiroth in the tree of life. There are ten Of them. MP evas 1-9 were the lesser sephiroth, and Shinji in unit one was placed at the head. (kether) the tree of life is basically an illustration of reality, the univereses creation, and the order of life. So by recreating it, and making Shinji become kether, he basically becmes god, and is given the task of initiating third impact by opening the hall of gaff. However, he rejects insturmentality because after a long psycobattle wtb himself, he realizes that wihout pain, here cannot be joy. And so, combining all of humanities consiousnesses would be pointless.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Fri Oct 16, 2009 9:52 am MatrixRefugee wrote: I've been contemplating who would choose to emerge from the sea of LCL and who wouldn't, and I suspect the SEELE dudes wouldn't, but this is a whole other discussion...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Oct 16, 2009 10:15 am Legendary wrote: 6. Lounge about for eternity. (succeeded? failed? hard to tell)

[]:             Quote Post by Agent_Koopa » Mon Oct 19, 2009 8:53 pm Legendary wrote: More likely scenario: Seele Checklist of Fun 1. Kill Gendo (failed, he escaped to TD) 2. Kill Shinji (failed, Misato rescued him) 3. Use the MP Evas to eliminate any other threats. (succeeded) 4. Use EVA-01 to summon the LnY from the moon to restrain EVA-01 (succeeded) 5. Use EVA-01 to turn everyone into tang (failed in execution but ultimately successful) 6. Lounge about for eternity. (succeeded? failed? hard to tell)

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Oct 19, 2009 10:18 pm The MPEs were most likely Seele's "backup plan" from the beginning in case Gendo double-crossed them or Lilith became useless to them. They obviously needed them to raid NERV and capture Unit-01 and then they needed the power of their S2s to initiate the anti-AT Field for 3rd Impact. Since I think I pretty much have all of this figured out I really should do a screen-cap commentary of EoE and explain all of this stuff... carla wrote: the MP evas were the "adam" part of the equation while eva 01 was the "lilith" part?
